commits: 6048bad: feat(11d): release-gate preflight + crate publish metadata
2aee3be: feat(11d): post-publish smoke scripts per AC-056
307cd64: feat(11d): wire actionlint as workflow validator
f4b51ed: chore(11d): flip src/ts/package.json to publishable npm metadata
c044edb: fix(11d): version pins for in-workspace deps + set-version coverage
out_of_scope_deferred: AC-054 standalone release-finalize.sh — partial via github-release job ordering (only runs after post-publish-smoke + co-tagging-assert succeed; if either is red, the release is never marked done)

blockers_encountered.description: cargo publish --dry-run -p fathomdb-engine failed locally: 'all dependencies must have a version requirement specified when publishing. dependency `fathomdb-embedder-api` does not specify a version'. Root cause: every in-workspace path dep needs a version requirement so the registry resolver can find it once cargo strips path= at publish time. Would have failed T4 at actual tag time even though local cargo build is happy.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Added [workspace.dependencies] block to Cargo.toml with one centralized version pin per sibling (Axis W for fathomdb / fathomdb-embedder / fathomdb-engine / fathomdb-query / fathomdb-schema; Axis E for fathomdb-embedder-api). Each crate's [dependencies] switched to <crate>.workspace = true. Extended scripts/set-version.sh + test_set_version.sh to keep the pins lockstep with their axis. cargo publish --dry-run for the three leaves now succeeds locally; deps for T4..T7 will resolve via crates.io in-order at actual tag time.

blockers_encountered.description: src/ts/package.json had `"private": true` and bare name `"fathomdb"`; publish-npm would not have published a private package. 11b output (dev/plans/runs/11b-napi-binding-output.json) contained no prior npm publish decision.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Flipped to `"private": false`. Kept the bare `"fathomdb"` name (NOT `@fathomdb/fathomdb`) to match the crate + python wheel — single brand across all three ecosystems. Added license / repository / main / types / files so the npm tarball ships dist/ + the platform-tagged native binaries.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added `description` field to the seven publishable crate manifests (fathomdb, fathomdb-cli, fathomdb-embedder, fathomdb-embedder-api, fathomdb-engine, fathomdb-query, fathomdb-schema). cargo emits a warning on publish without it; verify-release-gates.sh treats it as required so the release gate is green on a clean tree.
agent_verify_result: pass (after 1-time rerun of two listed flakes: ac_017_vector_projection_freshness_p99_le_five_seconds + ac_029_canonical_writes_complete_under_projection_stall — both passed in isolation; pre-existing host-load timing flakes unrelated to 11d)
next_step_for_orchestrator: promote to 0.6.0-rewrite; respawn codex reviewer for PASS verdict
